reference: HE SLACKENED HIS PACE AND TAPPED SHARPLY AT THE LITTLE WINDOW OF THAT MODEST POST OFFICE AT WHICH THE YOUNG LADIES IN THE PONY CARRIAGE HAD PULLED UP THE DAY BEFORE AND WITHIN WHICH LUKE WAGGOT WAS WONT TO SLEEP IN A SORT OF WOODEN BOX THAT FOLDED UP AND APPEARED TO BE A CHEST OF DRAWERS ALL DAY
text: he slackened his pace and tapped sharply at the little window of that modest post-office at which the young ladies in the pony carriage had pulled up the day before and within which luke waggett was wont to sleep in a sort of wooden box that folded up and appeared to be a chest of drawers all day so so so
